title: Fix Admin Panel link not appearing in Navbar

requirements.summary: Fix useIsCallerAdmin query to use authenticated actor and re-fetch on identity change
acceptanceCriteria: useIsCallerAdmin calls isCallerAdmin() on the authenticated backend actor
The query key includes the user's principal or identity so it invalidates on login/logout
The query is disabled when no identity is present (unauthenticated)
After admin logs in, the query re-fetches and returns true without requiring a page reload

file_operations.description: Modify the useIsCallerAdmin hook to: (1) enable the query only when both actor and identity are available by checking `!!actor && !!identity && !actorFetching`, (2) include the user's principal string in the query key as `['isCallerAdmin', identity?.getPrincipal().toString()]` to ensure automatic invalidation on login/logout, (3) set `staleTime: 0` to force re-fetching on mount after login, and (4) ensure the queryFn uses the authenticated actor to call `actor.isCallerAdmin()` and properly handles the case when actor is not yet available.

requirements.summary: Fix Admin Panel link visibility in Navbar based on authentication and admin status
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Panel link is visible in the desktop navbar when the admin user is logged in
Admin Panel link is visible in the mobile hamburger menu when the admin user is logged in
Admin Panel link is NOT visible for non-admin authenticated users
Admin Panel link is NOT visible for unauthenticated users
Link does not flicker or briefly appear for non-admins during the loading state

file_operations.description: Modify the Navbar component to: (1) call `const { data: isAdmin, isLoading: adminCheckLoading } = useIsCallerAdmin()` at the top of the component, (2) update the condition for showing the Admin Panel link to `isAuthenticated && !adminCheckLoading && isAdmin === true` to prevent flickering during the loading state, (3) apply this same condition to both the desktop navigation links section and the mobile hamburger menu section, ensuring the link only renders when the user is confirmed to be an authenticated admin, and (4) verify the link navigates to /admin using the Link component from TanStack Router.

requirements.summary: Ensure authenticated actor creation and query invalidation after Internet Identity login
acceptanceCriteria: After login, the authenticated actor is immediately available for backend calls
The isCallerAdmin query is invalidated/refetched after a new identity is set
The Admin Panel link appears in the navbar within one render cycle after the admin logs in

file_operations.description: Verify that the useActor hook properly creates and caches the authenticated actor when identity changes. Add an explicit `queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['isCallerAdmin'] })` call inside the useEffect that runs when `identity` changes, ensuring all queries dependent on the authenticated actor (especially isCallerAdmin) are refetched immediately after login completes. This guarantees the Admin Panel link will appear promptly without requiring a page reload.
